education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical
raw_text:
67. After -Sales Tooling Support Engineer

Job Summary  
Handles post -installation su pport, maintenance, and customer service for tooling solutions.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Provide technical support after tool delivery  
• Handle customer complaints and service requests  
• Coordinate maintenance and repair activities  
• Ensure timely resolution of issues  
• Maintain service documentation  
• Build long -term customer relationships  
Required Skills  
• Customer support and communication  
• Tooling and maintenance knowledge  
• Problem -solving and coordination  
• Documentation and reporting   
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical  
Experience  
• 2–5 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹25,000 – ₹55,000 per month
